channel.title: Cyclocross Radio
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly news and interview show following the biggest cyclocross races in the US and Europe. Join us in the media pit for the best cyclocross analysis you'll find.
channel.itunes:author: CXHAIRS LLC
channel.description: Weekly news and interview show following the biggest cyclocross races in the US and Europe. Join us in the media pit for the best cyclocross analysis you'll find.

item.title: Episode 361 | 2026 World Championships
item.itunes:title: Episode 361 | 2026 World Championships
item.description:
Tyler Cloutier joins Boedi and Bill to break down the 2026 UCI Cyclocross Championships that took place this past weekend. 

Cyclocross Radio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Hammerhead Karoo cycling computer. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

Go to cxhairsdistro.com and get a Wout Me Worry, Van der Poel Rules, and This Is Real Cyclocross Weather shirt for 20 percent off. Use the code WEATHER at checkout. Twenty percent!

Check out the Grassroots National Calendar and other cool stuff at cxhairs.com.

Cyclocross Radio is part of the Wide Angle Podium podcast network. Support independent cycling media by joining the Wide Angle Podium at wideanglepodium.com/donate.

Also, check out The CXHAIRS Bulletin at https://cxhairs.substack.com/. 

Follow @wideanglepodium on Instagram for live race updates

Follow Micheal on Twitter at @landsoftly and Instagram at @yeahyouride.

Follow Bill on Instagram at @cxhairs and @cxhairsbulletin.

You can find Cyclocross Radio and all of the Wide Angle Podium shows on Apple Podcasts if that's how you consume podcasts. Please rate and review us on Apple Podcasts, even if it's not how you consume podcasts.

item.title: Episode 348 | Luke Walter and GO Cross Preview
item.itunes:title: Episode 348 | Luke Walter and GO Cross Preview
item.description:
Boedi and Bill are joined by Luke Walter to talk about joining a new team that will be racing predominantly in Europe and his success at the U.S. UCI opener in Montana last weekend. We then preview the upcoming first round of the Trek USCX series that kicks off in Roanoke this weekend.

Follow Luke on Instagram at @luke.walterr.

Cyclocross Radio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Hammerhead Karoo cycling computer. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

item.title: Episode 347 | Cyclocross Is Still Here
item.itunes:title: Episode 347 | Cyclocross Is Still Here
item.description:
We are back! It's the beginning of another season of cyclocross, which means the beginning of another season of Cyclocross Radio. Boedi and Bill chat about the upcoming season, the upcoming first round of UCI racing in Montana, and then we tackle listener questions.

Cyclocross Radio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Hammerhead Karoo cycling computer. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

Go to cxhairsdistro.com and get a Wout Me Worry, Van der Poel Rules, and This Is Real Cyclocross Weather shirt for 20 percent off. Use the code WEATHER at checkout. Twenty percent!

Check out the new CXHAIRS.com website that includes the North American grass roots cyclocross calendar, a link to the CXHAIRS Bulletin, and info on the upcoming Pan-American Cyclocross Championships Nov 8-9 in Washington DC. 

Cyclocross Radio is part of the Wide Angle Podium podcast network. Support independent cycling media by joining the Wide Angle Podium at wideanglepodium.com/donate.

Follow @wideanglepodium on Instagram for live race updates

Follow Micheal on Twitter at @landsoftly and Instagram at @yeahyouride.

Follow Bill on Instagram at @cxhairs and @cxhairsbulletin.

You can find Cyclocross Radio and all of the Wide Angle Podium shows on Apple Podcasts if that's how you consume podcasts. Please rate and review us on Apple Podcasts, even if it's not how you consume podcasts.

item.title: Episode 345 | Curtis White
item.itunes:title: Episode 345 | Curtis White
item.description:
Curtis White joins Micheal and Bill to chat about his recent retirement, working as a coach for Team USA at the World Championships, selection criteria for Worlds, and memories from his long career as a professional cyclocross racer.

The holiday season may be over, but that doesn't mean you can't buy some sweet gear AT A DISCOUNT from your friends at CXHAIRS.  Go to cxhairsdistro.com and get a Wout Me Worry, Van der Poel Rules, and This Is Real Cyclocross Weather shirt for 20 percent off. Use the code WEATHER at checkout. Twenty percent!

Help the U.S. athletes we talk about in this episode race against the best in the world. Donate to the Mud Fund at https://usacycling.org/foundation/mudfund.

Cyclocross Radio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Hammerhead Karoo cycling computer. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

item.title: Episode 336 | Nash Dash and Canadian Nationals
item.itunes:title: Episode 336 | Nash Dash and Canadian Nationals
item.description:
Micheal and Bill are back in the media pit to break down everything that happened at last weekend's Nash Dash and Canada's National Cyclocross Championships. We also hear from Lidia Cusack and Kerry Werner about their Nash Dash success. Finally, Bill does an eleventh-hour deep dive into the jersey requirements for someone who wins Pan Ams and a national championship. There's even a surprise ending!

item.itunes:title: Episode 332 | Major Taylor and Beringen

item.title: Episode 328 | Virginia's Blue Ridge GO Cross (Trek USCX Round One)
item.itunes:title: Episode 328 | Virginia's Blue Ridge GO Cross (Trek USCX Round One)
item.description:
Boedi and Bill get into the cyclocross weeds following a fantastic opening weekend of the Trek USCX series at Virginia's Blue Ridge GO Cross in Roanoke, Virginia. We talk about the racing, the plans (or lack thereof), and Boedi's foray into Instagram race commentator and golf-wear influencer.

Here are the time codes for interviews included in this episode:

Cold open | Kerry Werner Day 2

15:15 | Andrew Strohmeyer Day 1

26:01 | Scott Funston Day 1

37:12 | Strohmeyer Day 2

49:24 | McGill Day 1

51:45 | Clauzel Day 1

56:20 | Mani Day 1

1:02:15 | Clauzel Day 2

item.title: Episode 326 | We're Back!
item.itunes:title: Episode 326 | We're Back!
item.description:
Micheal and Bill get into the Media Pit to chat about the North American UCI cyclocross season that kicks off this weekend with Englewood CX in Wisconsin. We talk about who is racing, the new favorites, how the World Cup schedule affects North American racing, and where on the calendar Nationals should land.

item.content:encoded:
Micheal and Bill get into the Media Pit to chat about the North American UCI cyclocross season that kicks off this weekend with Englewood CX in Wisconsin. We talk about who is racing, the new favorites, how the World Cup schedule affects North American racing, and where on the calendar Nationals should land.

Cyclocross Radio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Hammerhead Karoo cycling computer. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

It's never the wrong season to ... buy a shirt! Go to cxhairsdistro.com and get a Wout Me Worry, Van der Poel Rules, and This Is Real Cyclocross Weather shirt, while supplies last.

Cyclocross Radio is part of the Wide Angle Podium podcast network. Support independent cycling media by joining the Wide Angle Podium at wideanglepodium.com/donate.

Also, check out The CXHAIRS Bulletin from at https://cxhairs.substack.com/. Download the Substack app and join in on the CXHAIRS Bulletin chats.

Follow Micheal on Twitter at @landsoftly and Instagram at @yeahyouride.

Follow Bill (@cxhairs) on Twitter and Instagram.

You can find Cyclocross Radio and all of the Wide Angle Podium shows on Apple Podcasts if that's how you consume podcasts. Please rate and review us on Apple Podcasts, even if it's not how you consume podcasts.

item.title: Episode 325 | Alec Pasqualina (USAC MTB Director)
item.itunes:title: Episode 325 | Alec Pasqualina (USAC MTB Director)
item.description:
USA Cycling Mountain Bike Director Alec Pasqualina joins Bill to chat about the upcoming Olympics, the MTB selection criteria, his role at USA Cycling and what can be done to bolster nationwide MTB athlete development.

You can follow Alec on Instagram at @a_pasq.

Cyclocross Radio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Hammerhead Karoo cycling computer. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

It's never the wrong season to ... buy a shirt! Go to cxhairsdistro.com and get a Wout Me Worry, Van der Poel Rules, and This Is Real Cyclocross Weather shirt, while supplies last.

Also, check out The CXHAIRS Bulletin from at https://cxhairs.substack.com/. Download the Substack app and join in on the CXHAIRS Bulletin chats.

You can find Cyclocross Radio, and all of the Wide Angle Podium shows on Apple Podcasts if that's how you consume podcasts. Also, rate and review on Apple Podcasts, even if it's not the way you consume podcasts.

item.title: Episode 321 | All Cyclocross First Team
item.itunes:title: Episode 321 | All Cyclocross First Team
item.description:
We are back in the Media Pit, with Zach, Micheal, and Bill, talking about the Middelkerke and Lille. We then pick our All Cyclocross First Team selections for the 2023-2024 season before debating the rules for induction into the Cyclocross Hall of Fame.

item.title: Episode 316 | Andrew Strohmeyer
item.itunes:title: Episode 316 | Andrew Strohmeyer
item.description:
Andrew Strohmeyer (CXD Trek Bikes) joins Bill to talk about how he started racing cyclocross and his experience racing Worlds as a junior before the two go into a deep dive on domestic racing, including classic battles Andrew had with Magnus Sheffield, the USCX series and the 2023 US Cyclocross National Championships.

Follow Andrew on Instagram at @andrew.strohmeyer and his team CXD Trek Bikes at @cxdtrekbikes.

Buy a shirt! Go to cxhairsdistro.com and get a Wout Me Worry, Van der Poel Rules, and This Is Real Cyclocross Weather shirt, while supplies last.

item.title: Episode 301 | Savilia Blunk
item.itunes:title: Episode 301 | Savilia Blunk
item.description:
Savilia Blunk (Rockrider-Ford Racing) joins Bill to chat about her recent cross country and short track national championship wins, racing the world cup circuit, growing up in mountainbiking and her desire to stay in XCO and not jump ship to gravel like many of her peers.

Follow Savilia at @saviliablunk on Instagram.

Cyclocross Radio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

item.title: Episode 299 | Nino Makes MTB History at Lenzerheide
item.itunes:title: Episode 299 | Nino Makes MTB History at Lenzerheide
item.description:
We are back in the Mountain Bike Media Pit with Elisabeth, Zach and Bill to talk about Nino Schurter's historic day, Rachel Atherton's incredible return to downhill and all of the other short track, XCO and DH action from the Lenzerheide MTB World Cup that took place in Switzerland. 

Cyclocross Radio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

item.title: Episode 298 | Nove Mesto MTB World Cup
item.itunes:title: Episode 298 | Nove Mesto MTB World Cup
item.description:
We are back in the Mountain Bike Media Pit with Elisabeth, Zach and Bill to break down all the short track and XCO action from the Nove Mesto MTB World Cup that took place in Czechia. We also chat about Discovery taking over as broadcast partner for the MTB World Cup series and new tech zone rules.

item.title: Episode 290 | Jesse Anthony
item.itunes:title: Episode 290 | Jesse Anthony
item.description:
Jesse Anthony, USA Cycling Cyclocross and MTB Director, joins Zach and Bill to talk about the selection of the 2023 US Cyclocross World Championships. We discuss USA Cycling's philosophy behind selecting a Worlds team and how that philosophy has evolved over the years. We also ask Jesse questions from readers of the CXHAIRS Bulletin.

After speaking with Jesse, Zach and Bill run down the highlights from last weekend's European national championships.

You can contact Jesse at janthony@usacycling.org.

Cyclocross Radio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

You can find Cyclocross Radio, and all of the Wide Angle Podium shows on Apple Podcasts if that's how you consume podcasts. Also, rate and review on Apple Podcasts, even if it's not the way you consume podcasts.

item.description:
We are back in the Media Pit talking about everything that happened this past weekend at The Northampton International Cyclocross presented by Cycle-Smart, Neil and the Beekse Bergen World Cup.

Please take a minute to visit our sponsor, Forever Endurance on Instagram at @foreverendurance and at www.foreverendurance.com. 

Also, check out our Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

Finally, visit Endura! No matter what type of riding you do, Endura have you covered. CX, gravel, mountain bike or road they have apparel and accessories for every rider. Visit endurasport.com to see all of their latest winter ranges and use the code "Wideangle20" for 20% off your next order.

Follow Micheal on Twitter at @landsoftly and Instagram at @yeahyouride.

Follow Zach on Twitter at @theshoestar and Instagram at @zacharyschuster and at  @cxhairsbulletin.

Need coffee? (Trick question, you do). Check out our partnership with Grimpeur Bros and the amazingly tasty Hello Cyclocross Friends! Espresso blend here: https://www.grimpeurbros.com/products/hello-cyclocross-friends-wap-espresso.

item.title: Episode 272 | Brannon Pack
item.itunes:title: Episode 272 | Brannon Pack
item.description:
For episode 272 of Cyclocross Radio, Bill chatted with Brannon Pack, the Experience Fayetteville Cycling Coordinator about the upcoming World Cup and OZ Cross weekend as well as the 2022 Cyclocross World Championships that took place this past February in Fayetteville.

For more information about OZ Cross and cyclocross in Fayetteville, visit https://www.cyclocrossfayettevillear2022.com/

Check out our sponsor Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

Also, visit our sponsor, Endura! No matter what type of riding you do, Endura have you covered. CX, gravel, mountain bike or road they have apparel and accessories for every rider. Visit endurasport.com to see all of their latest winter ranges and use the code "Wideangle20" for 20% off your next order.

Follow Micheal on Twitter at @landsoftly and Instagram at @yeahyouride.

Follow Zach on Twitter at @theshoestar and Instagram at @zacharyschuster

Follow Bill (@cxhairs) on  Twitter and  Instagram and the CXHAIRS Bulletin on Instagram at @cxhairsbulletin.

Check out Hot Lap Summer and subscribe to the Wide Angle Podium YouTube channel at www.youtube.com/wideanglepodium.

Check out The CXHAIRS Bulletin from Zach and Bill at https://cxhairs.substack.com/.

You can find Cyclocross Radio, and all of the Wide Angle Podium shows on Apple Podcasts if that's how you consume podcasts. Also, rate and review on Apple Podcasts, even if it's not the way you consume podcasts.

Have a question, comment, complaint, or general inquiry? Hit us up at feedback@cxhairs.com, And don't hesitate to call the helpline: 405-CXHAIRS (405-294-2477).

Need coffee? (Trick question, you do). Check out our partnership with Grimpeur Bros and the amazingly tasty Hello Cyclocross Friends! Espresso blend. You can get these flavorful and possibly magical beans here: https://www.grimpeurbros.com/products/hello-cyclocross-friends-wap-espresso.

item.title: Episode 271 | Caleb Swartz
item.itunes:title: Episode 271 | Caleb Swartz
item.description:
On episode 271 of Cyclocross Radio, Bill chats with Caleb Swartz about entering his second year as a cyclocross elite racer, his offseason of gravel and mountainbiking, and what it means to be a professional cyclocross racer in 2022.

You can follow Caleb on Instagram at @cswartzz. 

Check out our sponsor Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

Also, visit our sponsor, Endura! No matter what type of riding you do, Endura have you covered. CX, gravel, mountain bike or road they have apparel and accessories for every rider. item.title: Episode 270 | Kerry Werner
item.itunes:title: Episode 270 | Kerry Werner
item.description:
Kerry Werner is back. Bill catches up with Kerry in his Vinton, Virginia, home following the US Amateur Road National Championships to talk about his season so far and his plans for the rest of the year. We also try, once again, to fix US cyclocross.

Follow Kerry on youtube at https://www.youtube.com/c/KerryWernervlog and on Instagram at @kerryw24.

Check out our sponsor Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

Also, visit our sponsor, Endura! No matter what type of riding you do, Endura have you covered. CX, gravel, mountain bike or road they have apparel and accessories for every rider. Visit endurasport.com to see all of their latest winter ranges and use the code "Wideangle20" for 20% off your next order.

item.title: Episode 264 | Back in the Pit
item.itunes:title: Episode 264 | Back in the Pit
item.description:
It's Episode 264 of Cyclocross Radio and we are back in the media pit after a short break following the 2021-2022 cyclocross season. On the show, we talk about how the cyclocross gods are faring on the road, the still murky upcoming UCI CX calendar, what happened to Jingle Cross, and more! 

This episode is brought to you by Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free Custom Color Kit AND an exclusive premium water bottle with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.

Follow Micheal on Twitter at @landsoftly and Instagram at @yeahyouride.

Follow Zach on Twitter at @theshoestar and Instagram at @zacharyschuster

Follow Bill (@cxhairs) on  Twitter and  Instagram and the CXHAIRS Bulletin on Instagram at @cxhairsbulletin.

Check out Hot Lap Summer and subscribe to the Wide Angle Podium YouTube channel at www.youtube.com/wideanglepodium.

Check out The CXHAIRS Bulletin from Zach and Bill at https://cxhairs.substack.com/.

Visit our sponsor, Endura! No matter what type of riding you do, Endura have you covered. CX, gravel, mountain bike or road they have apparel and accessories for every rider. Visit endurasport.com to see all of their latest winter ranges and use the code "Wideangle20" for 20% off your next order.

You can find Cyclocross Radio, and all of the Wide Angle Podium shows on Apple Podcasts if that's how you consume podcasts. Also, rate and review on Apple Podcasts, even if it's not the way you consume podcasts.

Have a question, comment, complaint, or general inquiry? Hit us up at feedback@cxhairs.com, And don't hesitate to call the helpline: 405-CXHAIRS (405-294-2477).

item.content:encoded:
It's Episode 264 of Cyclocross Radio and we are back in the media pit after a short break following the 2021-2022 cyclocross season. On the show, we talk about how the cyclocross gods are faring on the road, the still murky upcoming UCI CX calendar, what happened to Jingle Cross, and more!

This episode is brought to you by Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free Custom Color Kit AND an exclusive premium water bottle with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code CXRADIO at checkout to get yours today.
